headline: Truist Reiterates Hold on Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS), Cuts Price Target to $45

headline: Is Truist Financial (TFC) Offering Value After A 28.5% One-Year Share Price Gain
summary: If you are wondering whether Truist Financial's current share price offers good value, it helps to start by separating short term share price swings from longer term fundamentals. The stock last closed at US$48.21, with returns that declined 0.4% over the past week and 5.3% over the past month, while the 1 year return is 28.5% and the 3 year return is 77.2%. Recent market attention has focused on Truist Financial's position within the broader US banking sector, particularly how investors are...
